series.title: Metaphors for Software
series.tagline: Software is a craft. This is how you build it.

part1.name: The Metaphorical Story
part1.purpose: Build intuitive understanding before any code appears

part2.name: The Visual Blueprint
part2.purpose: Make abstract architecture concrete and navigable

part3.name: The Code Adapter
part3.purpose: Translate metaphor into real production syntax with before/after examples

domains.name: The Workshop
domains.subtitle: The Foundations
domains.focus: The individual artisan at their desk. The atoms of code.

domains.name: The Factory
domains.subtitle: The DevOps and Delivery
domains.focus: Automation and scale. The assembly line that ships software.

books.title: Lightbulbs on Classes
books.storyTitle: The Story of the Master Glassblower

books.title: The Data Drawer
books.metaphor: Organizing a cluttered desk with dividers, labels, and folders
books.storyTitle: The Story of the Archivist Who Lost Everything

books.title: The Recursive Mirror
books.metaphor: A room of mirrors where each reflection is a smaller version of the original
books.storyTitle: The Story of the Painter Inside the Painting

books.title: The Pointer Compass
books.metaphor: Maps, street addresses, and pointing to where the treasure is buried
books.storyTitle: The Story of the Cartographer's Map

books.title: Subnetting Espresso
books.metaphor: Concentrated doses of IP math using coffee cup sizes and room dividers
books.storyTitle: The Story of the Barista Who Divided the Café

books.title: The API Post Office
books.metaphor: Envelopes, stamps, return addresses, and delivery protocols
books.storyTitle: The Story of the Overworked Postman

books.title: The Load Balancing Traffic Cop
books.metaphor: Directing cars to different lanes to prevent a massive traffic jam
books.storyTitle: The Story of the Officer at the Crossroads

books.title: The Firewall Border Patrol
books.storyTitle: The Story of the Border That Never Slept

books.title: The Docker Shipping Container
books.metaphor: Standardized metal boxes that fit on any ship, train, or truck
books.storyTitle: The Story of the Cargo That Arrived Whole

books.title: The Ansible Assembly Line
books.metaphor: Robots on a factory floor following a playbook to build the same car every time
books.storyTitle: The Story of the Factory That Never Made the Same Mistake Twice

books.title: The CI/CD Conveyor Belt
books.metaphor: A belt that automatically checks every part for quality before it goes into the box
books.storyTitle: The Story of the Line That Refused Bad Parts

books.title: The Kubernetes Conductor
books.metaphor: An orchestra leader ensuring every instrument plays at the right time
books.storyTitle: The Story of the Conductor Who Never Lost a Note
